She views a temporary relocation to a remote Colorado town, a stark contrast to her urban upbringing, as the perfect catalyst for her professional aspirations. Her prior experience with rural living is limited, primarily stemming from her time at an exclusive country day school.

### An Unexpected Spark

In her search for a captivating story, Cara's journalistic pursuits lead to a serendipitous encounter. A kind man, reminiscent of a country music video star, offers his help. This chance meeting ignites an undeniable spark, and Cara finds herself falling deeply for him. As their relationship blossoms, she realizes that the most compelling narrative of all is their own unfolding love story.

### About the Book

*Second Chance Season* is the second installment in Liora Blake's Grand Valley series. This delightful and uplifting romance is a perfect recommendation for readers who enjoy authors like Jennifer Probst and Kristan Higgins, promising a charming escape and a deeply satisfying romantic journey.

Name: That Second Chance
Description:
It only took one rowdy night with his brothers to flip Griffin's world upside down. One unlucky encounter saddled them with a family curse and the promise of doomed relationships. Word spread quickly, and rumors about that night made them the most eligible yet untouchable bachelors in Port Snow, Maine. Then Ren Winters, the new girl in town, crashed into his life. Her thirst for a fresh start gave Griffin hope that maybe, just maybe, he could have one, too. Everyone wishes for that second chance ... -- adapted from back cover

## Parisian Renewal: A Fashion Editor's Second Chance

Fiona Monaghan, a driven fashion editor in New York, navigated a world of high-stakes glamour, her days a whirlwind of international travel and designer consultations. This meticulously crafted existence was unexpectedly challenged by John Anderson, a widower raising two daughters. John, a man with more conventional sensibilities, found himself intrigued and somewhat bewildered by Fiona's extravagant lifestyle.

A spontaneous invitation to the Paris couture shows proved to be a turning point for Fiona and John. Amidst the breathtaking fashion and enchanting Parisian evenings, a profound connection began to form. Back in New York, their relationship deepened. John grew to adore Fiona's bulldog, Sir Winston, while Fiona made room in her life for John and his family. However, their developing romance encountered obstacles. John's daughters were initially hesitant about Fiona, and domestic tensions surfaced with their Pekingese and a formidable housekeeper. A calamitous dinner party, intended to impress one of John's clients, further tested their bond.

This challenging phase initiated a profound period of heartache and self-reflection for Fiona. With newfound resolve, she returned to Paris by herself. There, as snow began to blanket the city, a series of extraordinary events commenced, signaling the dawn of Fiona's unexpected new chapter. This story delves into the compelling nature of attraction, the difficulties inherent in adapting to life's shifts, and the persistent optimism that accompanies fresh starts.

Name: Anchored Hearts
Description:
“A big-hearted, beautiful book about first love, second chances, and finding one’s place in the world. An exceptional getaway of a book!” —Emily Henry, New York Times bestselling author of Beach Read Sparks fly in the Florida Keys when award-winning photographer and prodigal son Alejandro ends up back home, forced to face the familia—and the girl he left behind—for the first time in years. Can these two Key West natives learn to put away old hurts and embrace a new future under the tropical sun? Effervescent with humor, romance, Latinx culture, and the unique island energy of Key West, Florida, the acclaimed Keys to Love Series by USA Today bestselling author Priscilla Oliveras is the perfect summer read. Now in mass market for the first time! Award-winning photographer Alejandro Miranda hasn’t been home to Key West in years—not since he left to explore broader horizons with his papi’s warning echoing in his ears. He wouldn’t be heading there now if it wasn’t for an injury requiring months of recuperation. The drama of a prodigal son returning to his familia is bad enough, but coming home to the island paradise also means coming face to face with the girl he left behind—the one who was supposed to be by his side all along… Anamaría Navarro was shattered when Alejandro took off without her. Traveling the world was their plan, not just his. But after her father’s heart attack, there was no way she could leave—not even for the man she loved. Now ensconced in the family trade as a firefighter and paramedic, with a side hustle as a personal trainer, Anamaría is dismayed that just the sight of Alejandro is enough to rekindle the flame she’s worked years to put out. And as motherly meddling pushes them together, the heat of their attraction only climbs higher. Can they learn to trust again, before the Key West sun sets on their chance at happiness?

## Butterfly Sisters: A Story of Second Chances and Self-Discovery

The transformative journey of a butterfly, from its emergence to its maiden flight, serves as a potent symbol for personal growth and overcoming adversity. This theme of finding one's true potential after struggle is central to "Butterfly Sisters," a compelling novel by the USA Today bestselling author of "The Beach House."

Leigh Henderson, a driven professional, finds her career aspirations abruptly halted when a new colleague, Rebecca Mayer, secures a lucrative deal that Leigh believed was hers. Her boss then informs her that her position is being eliminated, a devastating blow that marks the beginning of a cascade of life-altering events.

Leigh's mother summons her and her estranged sister, Meredith, to the family cabin on Old Hickory Lake. The reunion stirs painful memories of their grandmother's death and the years of silence between the sisters. Adding to the emotional weight, the cabin is also where Leigh might encounter Colton Harris, the enduring love she thought she'd left behind.

"Butterfly Sisters" explores whether confronting past grief, mending a fractured sisterly bond, and facing a lost love can lead Leigh to her true self. This heartwarming narrative promises a journey filled with laughter, tears, and a deeper appreciation for family. It's an ideal escape for fans of feel-good, small-town romances, reminiscent of Jenny's Christmas movies and the works of authors like Susan Wiggs, RaeAnne Thayne, and Susan Mallery.

## Ally Love: A Second Chance at Redemption and Romance

Ally Love's early life was marked by instability, lacking a consistent home or a supportive family. Football became her refuge and ambition, fueling a clear dream: the NFL. At twelve, a transformative encounter with a girl who would become her world changed everything. This girl, also navigating hardship, forged an immediate and profound bond with Ally, solidifying her determination to succeed, with her by her side.

### The Shadow of Disappearance

With college and professional football prospects on the horizon, Ally's future appeared promising, her partner a constant presence. This hopeful trajectory was abruptly derailed when she vanished without a trace. The sudden void left by her best friend and the love of her life plunged Ally into heartbreak and uncertainty. The enigma of her disappearance, as if she had never existed, consumed her for over a year.

### A Chance Encounter at Brooks College

More than a year later, Ally's life takes an unexpected turn. She unexpectedly encounters her again at Brooks College in Georgia. While a fierce need for answers and justice for her sudden departure still burns within her, a single glance into her tempestuous blue eyes reignites the powerful emotions she once felt.

### Unearthing Buried Truths

Despite the rekindled spark, Ally perceives that her partner is guarding secrets, actively pushing her away to keep them concealed. She believes her partner is underestimating her resolve. Ally is determined to uncover the truth and reclaim their connection, no matter the cost. She is confident that her partner cannot maintain this distance indefinitely, asserting that their bond is ultimately unbreakable.

This story is a standalone installment within the Brooks University series, delivering a compelling second-chance sports romance.

Name: That Love (German)
Description:
TROPES: Spielt in KC, Zweite Chance, American Football, Super Bowl, Berühmte Schauspielerin, Intrigante Ex, Liebenswerte Kinder. Als der Megastar Jennifer Edwards nach einer höchst publik gemachten Trennung von Paparazzi belagert wird, meldet sich ihre Freundin Jadyn und schlägt ihr vor, nach Kansas City zu kommen, um der sie umgebenden Verrücktheit zu entfliehen und zur Ruhe zu kommen. Das Schicksal nimmt eine unerwartete Wendung, und es dauert nicht lange, bis Jennifer Danny Diamond trifft, den charismatischen KC-Quarterback, der auf seinen dritten Meisterschaftsring hofft. Zwischen den beiden fliegen die Funken, und während Fans auf beiden Seiten ihre Liebesgeschichte verfolgen, hoffen alle auf ein glückliches Ende, das einen Ring an beider Finger stecken könnte.Dies ist das vierte Buch in der »That Boy«-Reihe, aber »That Love & That Ring« kann als eigenständiges Duett über Danny & Jennifer gelesen werden.

Name: Make Me Stay
Description:
Mother of two. Wife of one alpha. And alpha to his alpha. Lover of thrills and enticingly sexy chills. Amarie attended Azusa Pacific University graduate program. She has received two Bachelors and a Masters in Counseling. Beware anytime you open an Amarie Avant novel: It is is not your ordinary love story...

Name: Inevitable
Description:
Inevitable is an emotionally charged, second chance romance.AubreyThe day I lost my parents was the day he saved me.Jax Stonewood-my best friend's older brother.He was never meant to be my savior. My first real love.And certainly not my greatest heartbreak.I spent years getting over him and now he's back-the nation's most streamed artist and eligible bachelor... but I'm not falling for him again.Jax and I are done.JaxThe day I saved her was the day I lost myself to her.Aubrey Whitfield was only ever supposed to be my brother's best friend.Not my life. Not the one I would die for.Definitely not the one that would break me.She's built up walls to shut me out but I won't leave her behind again.Our souls are welded together.Aubrey has always been mine. I'll make her remember...Whether she likes it or not.We're inevitable.

Name: The Secret Keepers
Description:
When Reuben discovers an old pocket watch, he soon realizes it holds an incredible power: it can turn you invisible for fifteen minutes. And the watch's power is even more extraordinary than he knows. Soon, he's on the run from a despot determined to possess it for himself ...

Name: The Not-So Secret Society
Description:
Writing team Matthew Daley (Lantern City) and Arlene Daley call on their combined 25 years of education experience to create this thrilling coming-of-age adventure. Co-created by Trevor Crafts (Lantern City) and Ellen Crafts, and illustrated by Wook Jin Clark (Adventure Time: The Flipside), The Not-So Secret Society is an all-ages adventure that celebrates the value of teamwork and lifelong friendships. Madison, Dylan, Emma, Aidan, and Ava have pretty normal lives for a group of 12-year-olds: They go to school, participate in extracurricular activities, and oh yeah, they also have AWESOME ADVENTURES. Together they form The Not-So Secret Society. But when they invent a candy-making machine for their school's annual science fair, things don't go according to plan . . . and their candy creation comes to life and escapes, threatening to destroy the entire city!

**Uncover the Thrilling Mystery in "The Case of the Missing Cheetah"**

Prepare for an exhilarating adventure with "The Case of the Missing Cheetah," the captivating first installment in a brand-new, highly illustrated chapter book series. This delightful tale, praised by Andrea Beaty, #1 New York Times bestselling author of *Rosie Revere, Engineer*, as "fun, funny, and full of adventure," introduces readers to three wonderfully mischievous young girls who find themselves entangled in the shadowy world of espionage. As a dark and stormy night descends, these budding sleuths stumble upon a clandestine society comprised of some of history's most enigmatic female spies.

Their ordinary night takes an extraordinary turn when the glamorous spy Josephine Baker recruits them for a critical mission: to locate her beloved kidnapped cheetah, Chiquita. The question lingers: do these young girls possess the courage and cunning to step into the shoes of seasoned spies? Debut author-illustrator Veronica Mang masterfully crafts a playful pastiche, weaving together a vibrant tapestry of masters of disguise, skilled martial artists, brilliant codebreakers, and cunning double agents. "The Case of the Missing Cheetah" not only promises an engaging mystery but also serves as an exciting introduction for young readers to the captivating world of secret agents and the unforgettable women who shaped history through their covert operations.

Name: The World’s Oldest, Most Powerful Secret Society
Description:
I lost a friend. I know the feeling. I understand the implications. But, I can’t change the situation. I need to accept and move on. It is the case everywhere. No one is given a second chance. At least in fiction, we can imagine what things would be like if given an opportunity. The Golden Opportunity to revive a friend. This story is about friendship between teenagers that takes them on an expedition to unexpected places, unearth a new set of challenges and face their emotions towards one another. The evolution of their relationship among themselves and with their parents made a compelling story to be told. I wish you joy as you embark on a journey in your mind with these characters. I wish you the same pleasure reading this book as I had in writing it. “A fun, fast-paced story filled with magic, mystery, and adventure.” –David Aretha, Moonbeam Children’s Book Award winner

Name: The Secret Society (Poptropica Book 3)
Description:
In this exciting third installment of the Poptropica series, we find Mya, Oliver, and Jorge in the custody of a secret society whose mission is to protect and preserve Poptropica—a mysterious, uncharted island world. These Protectors, as they call themselves, believe that any outside interference with the islands of Poptropica could have catastrophic results on the course of history in the real world. As if things aren’t bad enough, Octavian has finally claimed possession of the confounding map, thwarted the society’s attempts to capture him, and is determined to alter the time line. The trio must join forces with the Protectors and find Octavian before he can go through with his evil plot, or all of human history might be changed—or worse—destroyed!

Name: Field Trip Disaster (DC Comics: Secret Hero Society #5)
Description:
Diana Prince (Wonder Woman), Bruce Wayne (Batman), and Clark Kent (Superman) take a field trip to the 31st century in this newest Secret Hero Society adventure! The first EVER Secret Hero Society volume narrated by Diana Prince (Wonder Woman)!When a foreign exchange student arrives at Justice Prep, Diana is excited to greet her! While Clark (Superman) is also curious to meet this shy student, Bruce (Batman) is wary. Bruce's suspicions are warranted when they are unable to find any record that this student even exists. When the three confront her, an accident transports them all the way to the 31st century! Now Diana, Clark, and Bruce get to meet the heroes of tomorrow... the Legion of Super Students!Our displaced time-traveling heroes will struggle to grasp future technology, homework assignments, and most importantly -- bullies. Especially one in particular who has a plan to go back in time and change the course of history! It's up to Clark, Diana, and Bruce to stop this villainous plan before it happens, and find their way back home in this newest Secret Hero Society adventure!

Diana Peterfreund's Ivy League novels, including *Secret Society Girl*, *Under the Rose*, *Rites of Spring (Break)*, and *Tap & Gown*, are a must-read for fans of *Beautiful Disaster*.

In *Secret Society Girl*, Amy Haskel, a junior at the elite Eli University, finds herself unexpectedly initiated into one of the nation's most infamous secret societies, Rose & Grave. This is a surprising turn of events for Amy, who doesn't fit the typical mold of wealth, political connections, or gender historically associated with the society. When she receives the coveted black-lined invitation bearing the Rose & Grave seal, she is astonished.

Upon undergoing an elaborate initiation rite, Amy awakens to a transformed reality and a new circle of acquaintances. These include the attractive son of a conservative governor and an Afrocentric lesbian activist known by the society name Thorndike. It is at this point that Amy begins to grasp the complex consequences of achieving one's desires.

Rose & Grave rapidly pulls Amy away from her accustomed life of academics and social gatherings. Her involvement fuels a growing feud and jeopardizes a promising friendship with benefits. The situation intensifies when Amy discovers her initial responsibility as a Rose & Grave member is to confront a conspiracy involving significant money and power, a conspiracy that could potentially devastate her entire life.

Name: Ghost Hunters Adventure Club and the Secret of the Grande Chateau
Description:
Listen up, kid. My name is Dr. Cecil H.H. Mills. I’m the author of this book and many other ones that you might not have heard of. This book is about two idiot wannabe detective-types. Their names are J.J. and Valentine Watts, but I’m not sure if they’re actually brothers or not. They make a friend; her name is Trudi de la Rosa. She’s a wannabe detective-type too, but honestly, she’s less of an idiot than the brothers. The three of them team up to solve a mystery that takes place in a snowy chateau up in the mountains. It gets more complicated around chapter 11, but now you’ve got the main gist of it. The story’s full of intrigue and adventure and puzzles and light violence and some swear words. It’s really entertaining. Just buy the book and start reading. You’ll understand everything about the Ghost Hunters Adventure Club very soon.

Name: Craft a Life You Love
Description:
Learn how to focus your creative energy to make things—and make things happen. In this blend of memoir and hardworking handbook, creativity and craft maven Amy Tangerine shows how to find your flow, maintain a positive mindset, and cultivate a rich and fulfilling life by focusing on what truly matters and implementing small yet powerful changes. Chapters explore how to craft the soul, craft the right mindset, craft the right environment, craft good habits, rediscover your creative mojo, and maintain momentum, with each section offering exercises for taking your creative practice to the next level. For anyone who has felt disconnected from their creativity or has had trouble saving a space for their passions, Craft a Life You Love will teach you how to make time for creativity each and every day.

## Understanding and Overcoming Your Upper Limit Problem

Many people believe happiness is a destination reached after achieving a major goal or finding a perfect relationship. However, positive events can sometimes be followed by negative emotions or self-sabotaging behaviors. Thoughts like "I don't deserve this" or "this is too good to be true" can prevent us from enjoying our successes.

New York Times bestselling author Gay Hendricks calls this the **Upper Limit Problem**. It's a common reaction to positive experiences that hinders both happiness and goal achievement.

### What is the Upper Limit Problem?

In his book, *The Big Leap*, Hendricks presents a program to help people overcome this barrier to lasting fulfillment. Based on his work with over a thousand high-achievers, the book explores the four core fears that drive the Upper Limit Problem.

### Identifying Your Limiting Fears

*The Big Leap* offers a practical way to identify which of these four fears is preventing you from reaching your full potential. Understanding the root cause allows you to develop strategies to break through these limitations.

### Achieving Your Zone of Genius

Hendricks provides a clear path to unlocking your true capabilities. This journey can lead to financial success, greater fulfillment in relationships, and allow you to consistently operate within your "Zone of Genius."

**The Enduring Quest for a Better Self: A Historical Perspective**

The pursuit of self-improvement, often perceived as a modern phenomenon tied to today's multi-billion-dollar self-help industry and its links to neoliberalism, actually boasts a profound and extensive history. This journey toward personal betterment stretches back to ancient China and has been a central theme for philosophers, sages, and theologians across millennia. These thinkers have consistently pondered the nature of a "good life" and developed various strategies to attain it.

Anna Katharina Schaffner's work, "The Art of Self-Improvement," offers a brilliant distillation of these key historical ideas. Schaffner identifies ten core concepts that have consistently appeared in self-improvement advice literature throughout the ages. She meticulously traces how these ideas have transformed across different cultures and historical periods, explaining their enduring relevance in contemporary society.

Schaffner's research highlights that there is significant value in examining these time-tested models. By studying historical self-improvement practices, we gain a powerful insight into the values, anxieties, and aspirations that have shaped human societies at different junctures. Furthermore, these practices reveal fundamental assumptions we hold about our purpose and our very nature. Schaffner finds more in contemporary self-improvement literature to admire than criticize, presenting a revelatory book that challenges common perceptions.

Name: Atomic Habits
Description:
The #1 New York Times bestseller. Over 20 million copies sold! Translated into 60+ languages! Tiny Changes, Remarkable Results No matter your goals, Atomic Habits offers a proven framework for improving--every day. James Clear, one of the world's leading experts on habit formation, reveals practical strategies that will teach you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones, and master the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results. If you're having trouble changing your habits, the problem isn't you. The problem is your system. Bad habits repeat themselves again and again not because you don't want to change, but because you have the wrong system for change. You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems. Here, you'll get a proven system that can take you to new heights. Clear is known for his ability to distill complex topics into simple behaviors that can be easily applied to daily life and work. Here, he draws on the most proven ideas from biology, psychology, and neuroscience to create an easy-to-understand guide for making good habits inevitable and bad habits impossible. Along the way, readers will be inspired and entertained with true stories from Olympic gold medalists, award-winning artists, business leaders, life-saving physicians, and star comedians who have used the science of small habits to master their craft and vault to the top of their field. Learn how to: make time for new habits (even when life gets crazy); overcome a lack of motivation and willpower; design your environment to make success easier; get back on track when you fall off course; ...and much more. Atomic Habits will reshape the way you think about progress and success, and give you the tools and strategies you need to transform your habits--whether you are a team looking to win a championship, an organization hoping to redefine an industry, or simply an individual who wishes to quit smoking, lose weight, reduce stress, or achieve any other goal.

Neuroscientist V.S. Ramachandran is celebrated for his groundbreaking work exploring the most intriguing questions about human nature. He tackles profound and often unusual aspects of the brain, employing remarkably simple, low-tech experiments. Using everyday items like cotton swabs, glasses of water, and mirrors, Ramachandran's research offers stunning insights into the brain's complex architecture.

In his book, *Phantoms in the Brain*, Dr. Ramachandran details how studying patients with rare neurological disorders has illuminated our understanding of ourselves. His findings shed light on how we form our body image, the reasons behind laughter and depression, and even our capacity for belief in God. He also explores how we make decisions, deceive ourselves, and dream.

Ramachandran's work delves into fascinating case studies. For instance, a woman paralyzed on her left side who believes she is using both hands to lift a tray of drinks provides a unique lens through which to examine Freud's theory of denial. Another case involves a man who claims to speak with God, prompting questions about whether humans might be inherently "wired" for religious experiences. Furthermore, a woman who hallucinates cartoon characters suggests that, in a way, we all experience a form of hallucination constantly.

Through his inspired medical detective work, Dr. Ramachandran pushes the boundaries of our understanding of the human mind. His research offers provocative new insights into fundamental questions about consciousness and the self, revealing the intricate workings of the brain.

## Unlock Your Potential with Ultralearning

In today's rapidly evolving world, the ability to acquire new skills quickly and effectively is paramount. "Ultralearning," a Wall Street Journal bestseller, presents a powerful framework for mastering hard skills at an accelerated pace. This guide is essential for anyone looking to future-proof their career, gain a competitive edge, and adapt to the constant shifts in the workplace.

### The Necessity of Lifelong Learning

The current era of economic and technological disruption demands continuous self-education. To truly accomplish more and distinguish yourself, embracing the principles of ultralearning is key. Many individuals fall into the trap of relying on outdated learning methods from their student days, hindering their progress. "Ultralearning" provides innovative strategies to break free from these mental ruts and implement training techniques that foster deeper retention and higher levels of mastery.

### Proven Principles for Rapid Skill Acquisition

Scott H. Young, the author, draws upon cutting-edge research and the inspiring journeys of successful ultralearners. These include historical figures like Benjamin Franklin and Nobel laureate Richard Feynman, as well as modern polymaths such as Judit Polgár, a chess grandmaster, and Nigel Richards, who won the French World Scrabble Championship without knowing French. Young meticulously documents the methods employed by himself and others, demonstrating that ultralearning is not an esoteric skill reserved for a select few, but a potent tool accessible to everyone.

### A Framework for Deep and Swift Learning

"Ultralearning" delves into this fascinating subculture, offering a proven framework for undertaking successful ultralearning projects. It provides actionable insights on how to structure and execute a plan to learn any subject deeply and rapidly, without the need for traditional teachers or expensive tuition. Whether your ambition is to become fluent in multiple languages, gain the equivalent of a college education in a significantly shorter timeframe, or acquire the diverse skills needed to launch a product or business, the principles outlined in "Ultralearning" will serve as your indispensable guide to achieving your goals.

Name: Personal Development for Smart People
Description:
Despite promises of "fast and easy" results from slick marketers, real personal growth is neither fast nor easy. The truth is that hard work, courage, and self-discipline are required to achieve meaningful results—results that are not attained by those who cling to the fantasy of achievement without effort. Personal Development for Smart People reveals the unvarnished truth about what it takes to consciously grow as a human being. As you read, you’ll learn the seven universal principles behind all successful growth efforts (truth, love, power, oneness, authority, courage, and intelligence); as well as practical, insightful methods for improving your health, relationships, career, finances, and more. You’ll see how to become the conscious creator of your life instead of feeling hopelessly adrift, enjoy a fulfilling career that honors your unique self-expression, attract empowering relationships with loving, compatible partners, wake up early feeling motivated, energized, and enthusiastic, achieve inspiring goals with disciplined daily habits and much more! With its refreshingly honest yet highly motivating style, this fascinating book will help you courageously explore, creatively express, and consciously embrace your extraordinary human journey.

**The Upside of Stress: Harnessing Challenges for a Healthier, Happier Life**

Contrary to popular belief, stress isn't inherently detrimental. Psychologist Kelly McGonigal, PhD, challenges the conventional wisdom that labels stress as a purely negative force, responsible for ailments like heart disease and insomnia. Her groundbreaking research, detailed in "The Upside of Stress," reveals a surprising truth: our perception of stress significantly impacts its effects on our well-being. McGonigal argues that it's not the experience of stress itself, but rather the belief that stress is harmful, that truly causes negative consequences.

By shifting our mindset, we can unlock the inherent benefits of stress. McGonigal's work, drawing on cutting-edge research in resilience and mindset, demonstrates that stress can actually enhance our lives. It can provide us with increased focus and energy, and even strengthen our interpersonal connections. "The Upside of Stress" is not about eliminating stress from our lives, which is often an unrealistic goal. Instead, it serves as a practical guide, offering a toolkit to help us become more adept at managing and leveraging stress. McGonigal empowers readers to cultivate a mindset that embraces challenges, enabling them to activate the brain's natural capacity for learning and growth from difficult experiences. This approach allows us to understand, accept, and ultimately utilize stress to our advantage, leading to a happier, healthier, and more goal-oriented existence.

Name: An Unexpected Peril
Description:
A princess is missing and a peace treaty is on the verge of collapse in this new Veronica Speedwell adventure from the New York Times bestselling and Edgar Award-nominated author Deanna Raybourn. January 1889. As the newest member of the Curiosity Club--an elite society of brilliant, intrepid women--Veronica Speedwell is excited to put her many skills to good use. As she assembles a memorial exhibition for pioneering mountain climber Alice Baker-Greene, Veronica discovers evidence that the recent death was not a tragic climbing accident but murder. Veronica and her natural historian beau, Stoker, tell the patron of the exhibit, Princess Gisela of Alpenwald, of their findings. With Europe on the verge of war, Gisela's chancellor, Count von Rechstein, does not want to make waves--and before Veronica and Stoker can figure out their next move, the princess disappears. Having noted Veronica's resemblance to the princess, von Rechstein begs her to pose as Gisela for the sake of the peace treaty that brought the princess to England. Veronica reluctantly agrees to the scheme. She and Stoker must work together to keep the treaty intact while navigating unwelcome advances, assassination attempts, and Veronica's own family--the royalty who has never claimed her.

Name: The Love Hypothesis
Description:
The Instant New York Times Bestseller and TikTok Sensation! As seen on THE VIEW! A BuzzFeed Best Summer Read of 2021 When a fake relationship between scientists meets the irresistible force of attraction, it throws one woman's carefully calculated theories on love into chaos. As a third-year Ph.D. candidate, Olive Smith doesn't believe in lasting romantic relationships—but her best friend does, and that's what got her into this situation. Convincing Anh that Olive is dating and well on her way to a happily ever after was always going to take more than hand-wavy Jedi mind tricks: Scientists require proof. So, like any self-respecting biologist, Olive panics and kisses the first man she sees. That man is none other than Adam Carlsen, a young hotshot professor—and well-known ass. Which is why Olive is positively floored when Stanford's reigning lab tyrant agrees to keep her charade a secret and be her fake boyfriend. But when a big science conference goes haywire, putting Olive's career on the Bunsen burner, Adam surprises her again with his unyielding support and even more unyielding...six-pack abs. Suddenly their little experiment feels dangerously close to combustion. And Olive discovers that the only thing more complicated than a hypothesis on love is putting her own heart under the microscope.

Name: Radiance
Description:
Ildiko has always known her only worth to the royal family lay in a strategic marriage. Resigned to her fate, she is horrified to learn that her intended groom isn't just a foreign aristocrat but the younger prince of a people neither familiar nor human. Bound to her new husband, Ildiko will leave behind all she's known to embrace a man shrouded in darkness but with a soul forged by light. Two people brought together by the trappings of duty and politics will discover they are destined for each other, even as the powers of a hostile kingdom scheme to tear them apart.

Name: Amour Amour
Description:
The best aerial technique won’t land 21-year-old Thora James her dream role in Amour—a sexy new acrobatic show on the Vegas strip. Thora knows she’s out of her element the second she meets Amour’s leading performer. Confident, charming and devilishly captivating, 26-year-old Nikolai Kotova lives up to his nickname as the “God of Russia.” When Thora unknowingly walks into the crosshairs of Nikolai’s after-show, her audition process begins way too soon. Unprofessional. That’s what Nik calls their “non-existent” relationship. It’s not like Thora can avoid him. For one, they may be partners in the future--acrobatic partners, that is. But getting closer to Nik means diving deeper into sin city and into his dizzying world. Thora wants to perform with him, but when someone like Nikolai attracts the spotlight wherever he goes—Thora fears that she’s destined to be just background to his spellbinding show. This sexy and exhilarating New Adult Romance can best be described as Cirque du Soleil meets the steamy, athletic romance of Center Stage.

**Navigating Romance When Life Feels Like a Rom-Com, But True Love Remains Elusive**

Chloe Sanderson's life often mirrors the whimsical scenarios of a romantic comedy, yet she grapples with a profound skepticism regarding the existence of true love. Her persistent optimism is not a product of a carefree existence, but rather a testament to her remarkable resilience. Chloe bears the significant responsibility of being the primary caregiver for her father, who is contending with early-onset Alzheimer's. This demanding role consumes nearly every facet of her life, leaving her with neither the time nor the emotional bandwidth to be swept off her feet by a whirlwind romance.

This personal reality sharply contrasts with the burgeoning career of her best friend, Annie, a talented screenwriter whose debut romantic comedy is on the cusp of a nationwide theatrical release. The film, quite remarkably, draws its narrative inspiration directly from Chloe's life experiences and her professional interactions with her pragmatic boss, Nick Velez. As the movie gains traction and public attention, Chloe finds herself increasingly exposed to media coverage, including articles and listicles that highlight Nick's admirable qualities. This external validation inadvertently begins to shape her perception of him, positioning him in her mind as a prime example of an ideal partner – perhaps even Reason #4 on a hypothetical list of perfect matches: the charming, scruffy-bearded professional who consistently offers unwavering support. Despite these external narratives and the undeniable chemistry she sometimes feels, Chloe remains uncertain whether her own life story will ultimately lead to the fairytale conclusion that Annie has so skillfully envisioned for them on screen.

Name: Slow Burn (Lost Kings MC #1)
Description:
“If Sons of Anarchy impregnated The Crossfire Series, their baby would be Slow Burn.” -Nothing But Sexy Books Blog Forced to represent an outlaw biker, a married attorney must come to terms with her feelings for her client while avoiding the danger he brings into her sedate life. President of the Lost Kings MC, Rochlan "Rock" North, hasn't managed to find a woman capable of making him want to curb his wild ways—until he meets sweet, innocent, married lawyer Hope Kendall. Forced to represent the outlaw biker, Hope is rattled by her immediate attraction to Rock. Hope is a good girl in a good marriage. Rock thrills her, but she's not going to throw away everything she's built on a fling with her criminal client. Rock respects Hope enough to leave her alone, even as he realizes he's become a little obsessed with her. When their connection endangers her life, he'll have to destroy her in order to save her. After tragedy strikes, Rock is determined to earn Hope's forgiveness and convince her that even with their staggering differences, they're meant to be together. Slow Burn is the first book in the popular Lost Kings MC series. It features a loving, faithful, dirty-talking alpha hero and a happy for now ending, not a cliffhanger. Name: Slow Burn
Description:
My new neighbor ticks all the right boxes.Tall - check.Muscular - check.Tatted - double check.Until he opens his mouth.Adam is grumpy, rude, and obnoxious as hell.And I really should tell him exactly where he can shove his insults.Instead, I bite my tongue.He intrigues me, and I can't fight the need I have to find out what caused the pain so evident in his dark eyes.Soon the thick, hungry flames surrounding Adam consume me.I should've known better.Because when you play with fire, you're bound to get burned.

## Unlock Lasting Love: A Behavioral Science Guide to Relationships

Finding enduring romantic connections can feel like a mystery, but behavioral scientist Logan Ury, author of "How to Not Die Alone," asserts that successful relationships are built on intentional choices, not luck. Our own thinking patterns often sabotage our search for love, and understanding these tendencies is crucial for fostering positive change and finding the relationship you desire.

Ury's research-backed approach, detailed in her book, provides a practical framework for navigating the complexities of modern dating. The guide is organized around pivotal decisions individuals encounter in their romantic journeys, integrating insights from behavioral science, original studies, and compelling personal stories. As acclaimed author Lori Gottlieb describes it, the book is a "simple-to-use guide" designed to help you overcome common dating pitfalls. Key strategies include identifying and altering negative dating habits, distinguishing essential partner qualities from superficial ones, and optimizing your online dating experience with expert advice. Furthermore, the book encourages broadening social circles through enjoyable activities and reframing dates from interviews into opportunities for genuine connection. Ury also challenges the myth of the immediate "spark," offering a more sustainable path to finding love. This "data-driven" resource, lauded by Time magazine, offers a comprehensive, step-by-step program with practical exercises, making it an indispensable tool for building and sustaining the relationship you seek.

## 100 Days of Sunlight: A Story of Resilience and Unexpected Connection

When a severe car accident blinds 16-year-old poetry blogger Tessa Dickinson, her world is consumed by darkness. Facing the terrifying possibility of losing her sight for 100 days, Tessa feels lost and hopeless, fearing her vision may never return. During this profound despair, she believes all joy has been extinguished from her life.

### An Unlikely Partnership

To help Tessa continue her passion for writing, her grandparents place an ad in the local paper seeking a typist. The response comes from Weston Ludovico, a boy her age with a bright smile and optimistic spirit. However, Weston carries a secret: he has no legs. Aware of Tessa's anger and fear, Weston offers his support, but with a crucial condition – Tessa must not be told about his disability.

### Overcoming Obstacles

Unable to see him, Tessa initially reacts with hostility, viewing Weston's presence as an intrusion. For Weston, this interaction is a rare moment of freedom; he is treated as a person, not an object of pity, which strengthens his resolve. Tessa, meanwhile, dismisses Weston's "obnoxious optimism," convinced he cannot possibly understand her struggles. Despite Tessa's resistance, Weston persists, reaching into her darkness to show her the world can be experienced in many ways. As their connection grows, Tessa finds it increasingly difficult to imagine a future without Weston, a feeling he deeply shares. Yet, Weston's secret casts a long shadow over their developing bond.

### The Truth Revealed

As Tessa's sight begins to return, Weston faces a difficult choice: disappear from her life or confront his fear of being truly known. This touching narrative, by author Abbie Emmons, explores themes of hope, healing, and the enduring strength of the human spirit. For readers who enjoy heartwarming contemporary romance and stories with strong family ties, *100 Days of Sunlight* is a moving testament to overcoming adversity and finding connection in unexpected places.

## Gabriel Scott: A First-Class Encounter with an Unforgettable Man

My journey to London took an unexpected turn with a first-class upgrade, a delightful surprise that immediately set the scene for a captivating encounter. The seat next to me was taken by Gabriel Scott, a man whose undeniable charm was rivaled only by his immense ego. He was a striking figure, handsome with an icy demeanor, and known for his impenetrable nature. As the manager for one of the world's most successful rock bands, Gabriel Scott projected an air of arrogance, regarding me with palpable disdain.

My initial plan as an ordinary girl who wasn't afraid to speak her mind was to make the long flight a living hell for him, determined to break through his carefully constructed facade. I believed him to be someone no one could truly reach. However, my intentions shifted as I found myself developing feelings for Gabriel Scott, accompanied by a growing desire. The most astonishing revelation was that he reciprocated these feelings, though in a way I never anticipated. Gabriel Scott's subsequent proposal presented a significant dilemma; accepting it meant risking falling for a man I thought I couldn't possibly "manage." Yet, the temptation to say yes was overwhelming, sensing that the man hidden beneath the impeccable suits and cool exterior might be the most extraordinary person I've ever met, and perhaps, I am the only one who can melt the ice around his heart. Let the real journey begin.

Name: Celebrity and Entertainment Obsession
Description:
Celebrity culture surrounds us. We are inundated with information about actors and actresses, athletes, musicians, and others who have become famous or infamous. Although we never will likely meet or get to know them, our interest in them seems boundless. We are literally obsessed with being entertained as well as with the people who entertain us. Who our celebrities are has also shifted; in the past, celebrity status was bestowed on men and women of great accomplishment, those who had given the world something to be proud of and to celebrate. Conversely, today’s celebrities are generally people involved in entertainment—from TV newscasters to people who appear on reality television programs, as well as some who are simply famous for being famous. What remains an enigma is why we, as a society, are so infatuated with being entertained, as well as with those who entertain us and appear in the media. This book makes sense of this spectacle by explaining the reasons for this obsession from a psychological, social, and historical perspective. It suggests that we have become addicted in much the same way that a person becomes addicted to drugs or alcohol. Finally, the author offers his observations on how to free our minds from this captivation. Anyone interested in understanding more about our need to live vicariously through the rich and famous will find answers in this book.

Name: Irresistible
Description:
“Irresistible is a fascinating and much needed exploration of one of the most troubling phenomena of modern times.” —Malcolm Gladwell, author of New York Times bestsellers David and Goliath and Outliers “One of the most mesmerizing and important books I’ve read in quite some time. Alter brilliantly illuminates the new obsessions that are controlling our lives and offers the tools we need to rescue our businesses, our families, and our sanity.” —Adam Grant, New York Times bestselling author of Originals and Give and Take Welcome to the age of behavioral addiction—an age in which half of the American population is addicted to at least one behavior. We obsess over our emails, Instagram likes, and Facebook feeds; we binge on TV episodes and YouTube videos; we work longer hours each year; and we spend an average of three hours each day using our smartphones. Half of us would rather suffer a broken bone than a broken phone, and Millennial kids spend so much time in front of screens that they struggle to interact with real, live humans. In this revolutionary book, Adam Alter, a professor of psychology and marketing at NYU, tracks the rise of behavioral addiction, and explains why so many of today's products are irresistible. Though these miraculous products melt the miles that separate people across the globe, their extraordinary and sometimes damaging magnetism is no accident. The companies that design these products tweak them over time until they become almost impossible to resist. By reverse engineering behavioral addiction, Alter explains how we can harness addictive products for the good—to improve how we communicate with each other, spend and save our money, and set boundaries between work and play—and how we can mitigate their most damaging effects on our well-being, and the health and happiness of our children. Adam Alter's previous book, Drunk Tank Pink: And Other Unexpected Forces that Shape How We Think, Feel, and Behave is available in paperback from Penguin.

Name: Alone Together
Description:
A groundbreaking book by one of the most important thinkers of our time shows how technology is warping our social lives and our inner ones Technology has become the architect of our intimacies. Online, we fall prey to the illusion of companionship, gathering thousands of Twitter and Facebook friends, and confusing tweets and wall posts with authentic communication. But this relentless connection leads to a deep solitude. MIT professor Sherry Turkle argues that as technology ramps up, our emotional lives ramp down. Based on hundreds of interviews and with a new introduction taking us to the present day, Alone Together describes changing, unsettling relationships between friends, lovers, and families.

Name: Unfriending My Ex
Description:
The author presents a humourous look at her obsession with the Internet and her cellular phone, arguing that her dependence is a sign of how social media has made it difficult for her and her peers to have meaningful connections to others.

Name: Networks Without a Cause
Description:
With the vast majority of Facebook users caught in a frenzy of ‘friending’, ‘liking’ and ‘commenting’, at what point do we pause to grasp the consequences of our info-saturated lives? What compels us to engage so diligently with social networking systems? Networks Without a Cause examines our collective obsession with identity and self-management coupled with the fragmentation and information overload endemic to contemporary online culture. With a dearth of theory on the social and cultural ramifications of hugely popular online services, Lovink provides a path-breaking critical analysis of our over-hyped, networked world with case studies on search engines, online video, blogging, digital radio, media activism and the Wikileaks saga. This book offers a powerful message to media practitioners and theorists: let us collectively unleash our critical capacities to influence technology design and workspaces, otherwise we will disappear into the cloud. Probing but never pessimistic, Lovink draws from his long history in media research to offer a critique of the political structures and conceptual powers embedded in the technologies that shape our daily lives.

Name: American Girls
Description:
A New York Times Bestseller Award-winning Vanity Fair writer Nancy Jo Sales crisscrossed the country talking to more than two hundred girls between the ages of thirteen and nineteen about their experiences online and off. They are coming of age online in a hypersexualized culture that has normalized extreme behavior, from pornography to the casual exchange of nude photographs; a culture rife with a virulent new strain of sexism; a culture in which teenagers are spending so much time on technology and social media that they are not developing basic communication skills. The dominant force in the lives of girls coming of age in America today is social media: Instagram, Whisper, Vine, Youtube, Kik, Ask.fm, Tinder. Provocative, explosive, and urgent, American Girls will ignite much-needed conversation about how we can help our daughters and sons negotiate the new social and sexual norms that govern their lives.

Name: Social Media Abyss
Description:
Social Media Abyss plunges into the paradoxical condition of the new digital normal versus a lived state of emergency. There is a heightened, post-Snowden awareness; we know we are under surveillance but we click, share, rank and remix with a perverse indifference to technologies of capture and cultures of fear. Despite the incursion into privacy by companies like Facebook, Google and Amazon, social media use continues to be a daily habit with shrinking gadgets now an integral part of our busy lives. We are thrown between addiction anxiety and subliminal, obsessive use. Where does art, culture and criticism venture when the digital vanishes into the background? Geert Lovink strides into the frenzied social media debate with Social Media Abyss - the fifth volume of his ongoing investigation into critical internet culture. He examines the symbiotic yet problematic relation between networks and social movements, and further develops the notion of organized networks. Lovink doesn't just submit to the empty soul of 24/7 communication but rather provides the reader with radical alternatives. Selfie culture is one of many Lovink's topics, along with the internet obsession of American writer Jonathan Franzen, the internet in Uganda, the aesthetics of Anonymous and an anatomy of the Bitcoin religion. Will monetization through cybercurrencies and crowdfunding contribute to a redistribution of wealth or further widen the gap between rich and poor? In this age of the free, how a revenue model of the 99% be collectively designed? Welcome back to the Social Question.

Will Storr's "Selfie" explores our deep-seated fascination with ourselves and the widespread rise of narcissism, which goes far beyond just taking pictures. Journalist Will Storr examines the history and psychology behind self-absorption, the constant search for perfection, and how we now build our personal brands to define who we are.

The book traces how our idea of self has changed over thousands of years. Storr links ancient Greek ideas, the focus on inner life during the Middle Ages, the self-esteem trends of the 1980s, and today's emphasis on being an individual. He looks into why we constantly examine ourselves and asks if this introspection truly leads to happiness or growth.

"Selfie" offers a clear look at our modern obsession with the self. As NPR's On Point noted, the book helps us understand "who we have become." It moves past simple ideas about "millennial narcissism" and selfie sticks to reveal a 2,500-year story of how our self-perception has developed. Storr connects thinkers from Aristotle to Steve Jobs, explores how nature and upbringing affect our drive for perfection, and shows how the book is relevant to navigating today's internet culture and personal lives. Critics have praised "Selfie" as an "intriguing journey" and a "must-read for understanding and dealing with the 21st century," noting its ability to combine centuries of thought on selfhood with a sharp analysis of internet culture.

Name: #Obsession
Description:
There is a real epidemic of social media addiction in this country and abroad - wherever anyone has access to the Internet. When a British youth tries to kill himself because he cannot take the perfect "selfie," we know humankind has crossed a line into dangerous and toxic territory. Beneath the surface topic of social media disorder, this book is really about self-esteem related disorders that lead to over-reliance on outside validation. Because it is new and pervasive, especially to a young generation raised under its influence and never knowing anything different, social media is the main culprit for behavior disorders plaguing otherwise balanced individuals. This book explores the outer extremes of the disorder and then furnishes several important, yet simple, processes by which to restore psychological balance. Social Media is a positive tool in our lives when used properly. This book serves as a guide on how to interact with social media in a healthy way. People are becoming more and more obsessed with communicating an idealized version of themselves to strangers and creating an electronic ghost personality that exists only because certain facts are edited out. This is one of the first and most enlightening books on this growing epidemic of social media addiction. It is a fascinating exploration of social media, but also a way to see yourself in the many amazing case histories - and decide if you are a victim of this modern malady. #Obsession will appeal to anyone who uses social media, which is nearly everyone on the planet, even people in third world countries. About the Authors Seyedeh Tina Sadri, M.A. L.M.F.T. is a licensed marriage and family therapist. She is the Founder of Newport Mental Wellness, a private practice in Newport Beach, California. Tina supports various programs in Orange County and has quickly gained notoriety for her support in programs that help women and children. She was featured as one of Orange County's Dynamic Women of 2014 in Modern Luxury Riviera Magazine. Her advocacy and experience in women and children's wellness was instrumental in writing about the topic of social media and its affect on today's society. Randall Frakes is a prolific screenwriter and book author. He is the author of bestselling first two TERMINATOR novelizations and co-authored . He edited an annotated JAMES CAMERON'S TITANIC: THE ILLUSTRATED SCREENPLAY and contributed to the bestselling JAMES CAMERON'S AVATAR: AN ACTIVIST SURVIVAL GUIDE.

**The Atmospherians: A New Venture Born from Online Ruin**

Sasha Marcus, once a celebrated figure in the wellness industry, found her life dramatically upended. Known for her high-profile brand and significant online following, Marcus became the target of an aggressive online troll. This confrontation escalated, leading to her being canceled and doxxed, leaving her isolated and facing protests from men's rights activists outside her apartment.

In her darkest hour, Sasha turns to her childhood friend, Dyson. Dyson, a former actor grappling with his own insecurities, proposes a radical plan to help Sasha rebuild her public image. He envisions her becoming the public face of his new business, "The Atmosphere." This venture is described as a rehabilitation community specifically designed for men.

Name: Team Challenges
Description:
Directed to teachers, facilitators, and counselors, offers more than 170 cooperative activities for classrooms, summer camps, and family occasions designed to improve children's problem-solving skills and ability to collaborate.

**The Knowledge Gap: Uncovering the Root Cause of America's Education Crisis**

"Essential reading for teachers, education administrators, and policymakers alike." —STARRED Library Journal

Natalie Wexler's "The Knowledge Gap" reveals a hidden explanation for America's persistent struggle to provide quality education for all children. After years in the education reform movement, Wexler discovered that the problem isn't due to common scapegoats like underperforming teachers, poor facilities, or a lack of accountability. Instead, the issue lies in a fundamental flaw within the elementary school curriculum: an overemphasis on decontextualized reading comprehension "skills" at the expense of building actual knowledge.

Drawing on history, research, and engaging narratives, Wexler exposes this overlooked problem. She highlights how reformers, journalists, and policymakers have long missed this crucial aspect, and how the general public, including many parents, remains largely unaware. "The Knowledge Gap" not only details what schools have gotten wrong but also showcases innovative educators who are successfully shifting their practices. These educators are fostering environments where students become not only excited to learn but also gain the essential knowledge and vocabulary needed for future success. To truly improve our education system and unlock the potential of disadvantaged children, addressing this knowledge deficit is imperative.

This handbook provides a thorough guide to the essential components of managing sports teams and organizations. It is designed to assist both full-time professionals and dedicated volunteers who currently hold management roles within professional and semi-professional sports clubs, leagues, and federations. Furthermore, it serves as a valuable resource for individuals aspiring to enter these management positions.

Beyond core management principles, this resource adopts an interdisciplinary approach. It delves into the fundamental aspects of law and media relations, recognizing their critical importance for the effective and successful operation of any team sports organization. By drawing on the expertise of specialists from various fields, the handbook presents its content in a clear, accessible, and practical manner. This approach ensures that the information is not only informative but also readily applicable to real-world management challenges, empowering readers to implement best practices within their own organizations.

Name: The Hard Hat
Description:
Great teammates don’t just impact you today; they impact you for the rest of your life. From the moment Jon Gordon heard about George Boiardi and the Hard Hat he was intrigued and captivated. Over the years he visited George’s coaches, attended several “21 Dinners” held in his honor, met his family, talked to his teammates and observed how he inspired all who knew him. The Hard Hat is an unforgettable true story about a selfless, loyal, joyful, hard-working, competitive, and compassionate leader and teammate, the impact he had on his team and program and the lessons we can learn from him. The book features: A True Story about George Boiardi, his Team and their Legacy. 21 Lessons to be a Great Teammate Insights from George’s Teammates and Coaches that Bring the Lessons to Life. 21 Exercises to help you Build a Great Team Infused with practical insights and life changing lessons, The Hard Hat will inspire you to be the best teammate you can be and to build a great team. *100% of author’s royalties go to support the Mario St. George Boiardi Foundation

## A Parent's Guide to Youth Sports: Navigating the Athletic Journey

The world of youth sports presents parents with a complex landscape of decisions, from initial enrollment and age-appropriate participation to the significant commitment of travel teams and selecting the right organization. Financial planning is a constant concern, as is managing the emotional impact of a child's potential disappointment, such as not making a high school team.

To help parents navigate these intricate aspects of youth athletics, the book "30 Second Timeout" offers a comprehensive guide. This resource is designed to address the multifaceted challenges of a child's involvement in sports today, aiming to enhance the experience of educational athletics for both parents and young athletes. The journey through youth sports is an emotional rollercoaster, filled with moments of joy, celebration, disappointment, frustration, and immense pride. Research from the National Alliance for Youth Sports indicates these emotional fluctuations are a natural part of development, often fostering unexpected personal growth. "30 Second Timeout" encourages parents to embrace this "crazy but extremely rewarding journey" as a shared family experience, cultivating resilience, imparting life lessons, and deepening connections by exploring the full spectrum of emotions inherent in sports.

## Rethinking Youth Sports: Cultivating Life Lessons Over Wins

The current youth sports environment often prioritizes winning and future aspirations, leading to a concerning 70% of children quitting organized sports by age thirteen. This decline contributes to a generation grappling with rising obesity rates and diminished overall health. Fortunately, a more beneficial approach exists, one that shifts the focus from the scoreboard to the invaluable life lessons sports can impart.

John O'Sullivan's influential book, "Changing the Game," champions this transformative perspective. It outlines strategies for parents and coaches to cultivate an environment where positive core values and enduring life lessons take precedence over the singular pursuit of victory. This paradigm shift fosters well-rounded individuals who gain far more from their athletic experiences than mere wins and losses.

"Changing the Game" offers a practical roadmap for adults involved in youth athletics, guiding them to nurture children who are both happy and capable. The book acts as a national call to action, urging a return to the fundamental purpose of youth sports: to deliver enjoyable and profoundly meaningful experiences for every child. As James Taylor, Ph.D., author of "Positive Pushing," aptly states, "Changing the Game is, well, a game changer." He highlights the book's comprehensive exploration of the youth sports landscape, making it an indispensable resource for any parent aiming to maximize the physical, psychological, emotional, and social benefits of sports participation while minimizing potential drawbacks.

Name: Sports Marketing
Description:
Highly practical and engaging, Sports Marketing equips students with the skills, techniques, and tools they need to be successful marketers in any sporting environment. The book blends relevant marketing theory—focusing on industry-specific terminology and practices—with practitioner insights into current issues and future directions in the sports industry. This anticipated third edition has been fully updated to incorporate a broad range of global and diverse perspectives from industry experts and international case studies throughout. Contemporary topics within the sports industry have been expanded upon, including esports, social responsibility, sustainability, digital and social media, and personal branding. Popular "You Make the Call" cases, insider and early career insights, and review questions stimulate lively classroom discussion, while chapter summaries and terms support further support learning. Overall, this exciting text will: • Increase students’ depth of knowledge about sports marketing • Challenge students to apply concepts to real-world situations • Profile best practices of organizations and individuals within the sports industry as they relate to the book’s content • Equip students to position themselves to compete for entry-level positions in sports business • Provide faculty with a concise but thorough text that meets their needs. Sports Marketing remains a core textbook for undergraduate and postgraduate students of sports marketing and management, providing a firm grasp of the ins and outs of working in sports. Additional online resources include PowerPoint slides for each chapter, a test bank of questions, and an instructor’s manual.

## Leadership Lessons from Sports for Business Success

This collection, "HBR's 10 Must Reads on Leadership Lessons from Sports," extracts valuable management strategies from elite athletics. It features insights from figures like Sir Alex Ferguson, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, and Andre Agassi, showing how their peak performance tactics can translate to the business world.

### Building Resilience: Beyond Strengths

The book stresses the importance of addressing weaknesses, not just focusing on existing strengths. This approach builds resilience and drives continuous improvement, vital for lasting success in competitive fields.

### The Athlete's Mindset: Mental Toughness and Energy

Learn how top athletes manage their mental strength and energy before crucial moments. This section explores building confidence and maintaining focus under pressure, with parallels to high-stakes business situations.

### Turning Teams Around

Discover how coaches like Bill Parcells revitalize struggling teams. The articles cover inspiring collective effort and achieving success despite significant challenges.

### Beyond Metrics: The Power of Long-Term Vision

This compilation questions the over-reliance on performance metrics, highlighting their limitations. It promotes a long-term strategic view, essential for overcoming setbacks and reaching enduring objectives.

### When Sports Analogies Don't Fit

While sports offer useful business metaphors, this collection also points out where these comparisons falter. Understanding these differences is key to applying lessons effectively and avoiding mistakes.

**Featured Content:**

*   "Ferguson's Formula" by Anita Elberse with Sir Alex Ferguson
*   "The Making of a Corporate Athlete" by Jim Loehr and Tony Schwartz
*   Interviews with Kareem Abdul-Jabbar and Andre Agassi
*   "Major League Innovation" by Scott D. Anthony
*   "Why Sports Are a Terrible Metaphor for Business" by Bill Taylor

Name: Multidisciplinary Perspectives on Team Sports: Contextualizing Training and Competition Demands
Description:
Team sports performance is determined by the complex, non-linear interaction of several factors, including physical and physiological aspects, technical-tactical constraints, mental demands, perceptual and emotional aspects, and contextual and environmental factors. The influence of each of these aspects has been previously investigated. However, studies have often employed monodimensional perspectives, looking at one, or only a few different domains concurrently. In football and rugby, extensive efforts have been produced to contextualize the demands of training and competition based on players’ characteristics, tactical constraints, and contextual factors. This information facilitates coaches in selecting the most appropriate training and competition strategies based on a number of different factors, including the team and the opponents’ characteristics, technical-tactical abilities, fitness status, and considering contextual factors. Differently, there is a lack of information on contextualized competition demands in other team sports, such as basketball, handball, futsal, and volleyball. Furthermore, the mental demands and psychological and emotional implications of team sports have received little or monodimensional attention, limiting the applicability of findings in real-life scenarios where a multitude of factors belonging to different disciplines (e.g., physiology, psychology, training science, social sciences) need to be taken into account.

Name: The Sports Playbook
Description:
Why do so many sports teams have losing records, year after year? Why do others win big, but only every 20 or 30 years? And why is it that so few teams enjoy sustained, continual success? This book gives the answer. Providing a blueprint or "playbook" for success in sports at every level, it lays out a clear step-by-step plan for building a team culture that will lead to winning consistently. With each step, the book introduces real-world tools that can be easily implemented by every sports organization and coach to achieve success, including team charters, individual athlete plans, player accountability systems, and team communication strategies. It offers expert advice and practical guidance on key areas, such as aligning individuals with a clear team plan, resolving conflicts proactively, and learning from every game and every season to develop a smarter and more consistent culture of success. The Sports Playbook: Building Teams that Outperform, Year after Year will help every team fulfil its true potential through leadership, focus, and performance. It is essential reading for coaches, sport management professionals, and leaders of every kind of team, inside and outside of sports. The foreword, introduction, chapter 1 and chapter 2 of this book are freely available as downloadable Open Access PDFs under a Creative Commons Attribution-Non Commercial-No Derivatives 4.0 license available at http://www.taylorfrancis.com.

Name: Stress Management
Description:
Here is a comprehensive clinical manual focused on stress management and relaxation. It contains detailed descriptions of tactics for training the user in the methods of relaxation, positive thinking, time management, and more. Features validated self-tests (normed on over 1000 individuals), and first-time ever stress management motivations and irrational beliefs inventories. This hands-on resource is essential for practitioners introducing stress management techniques into their practice; students who are learning how to cope with stress; practitioners-in-training, and clinicians looking for a refresher course.

Name: 8 Keys to Stress Management (8 Keys to Mental Health)
Description:
Easy strategies for dealing with the near-universal experience of stress. Stress has become a near-universal experience as well as a rising public health concern. According to many measures, people today are dealing with stressors that are greater in number and severity than in the past several decades, and this stress is taking a toll on our collective wellness. Bringing considerable content from her popular stress management Web site on About.com, Elizabeth Scott distills information about stress management into central ideas and strategies for consumers. These include learning to reduce the stress response and stressors, practicing long-term resilience habits, and putting positive psychology research into action. These various perspectives provide a multilayered framework for understanding stress and approaching stress management that is inspirational, action-oriented, and backed by foundational and recent knowledge in the field. The quick-to-read “8 keys” format of the book can be utilized on many levels so that busy readers can quickly find relief from stress.

## Understanding and Managing Stress: A Scientific Approach

Stress is a constant companion in our daily lives. While we often navigate its challenges successfully, there are times when it feels overwhelming. Recognizing how stress impacts our overall health and well-being is crucial for effectively managing it. Stress doesn't just occupy our minds; it profoundly affects our physical bodies. This can manifest through the "fight or flight" response, inflammation, feelings of anxiety, and even physical illness, ultimately impacting our minds and bodies from within.

### The Science Behind Stress

Many resources offer practical tips for stress management. However, this book delves deeper, exploring the scientific principles that explain how stress influences our minds and bodies. It presents evidence-based strategies designed to yield optimal results in managing stress. Dr. Amitava Dasgupta illuminates the intricate mechanisms that activate when we experience stress. He provides clear guidance on how to address the resulting physical and mental responses.

### Evidence-Based Strategies for Better Health

While firmly rooted in the science of stress, this work empowers readers to implement effective strategies. By understanding the underlying science, individuals can better manage stress and promote improved overall health. This comprehensive approach ensures that readers gain not only knowledge but also actionable tools for a healthier, more balanced life.

**College Stress Solutions: Your Guide to Thriving in Academia**

Navigating college life presents a unique set of challenges, from academic pressures to social dynamics and future career anxieties. In today's competitive landscape, the drive to succeed can often be accompanied by overwhelming stress, ironically hindering the very goals you're striving to achieve. "College Stress Solutions" offers a practical and accessible approach to managing these everyday pressures. This guide equips you with simple yet powerful exercises designed to help you overcome anxiety and cultivate success throughout your academic journey.

Whether you're facing a looming assignment deadline, managing interpersonal relationships with classmates, or contemplating your post-graduation prospects, this book provides the essential tools and actionable advice needed to foster a sense of calm, relaxation, and motivation. The strategies presented are easy to implement, yet remarkably effective, empowering you to confidently tackle any social or academic demand that arises as you pursue your degree. From intense exam preparation to resolving roommate conflicts, these solutions will enable you to move beyond your worries and achieve the academic results you deserve.

Name: Mindful Strategies for Helping College Students Manage Stress
Description:
This practical resource offers a much-needed introduction to the why, what, and how of supporting college students through mindfulness and stress-releasing strategies. Higher education professionals are in a unique position to support, coach, and teach strategies with students to manage anxiety and emotional distress and improve well-being. Drawing on experience from the disciplines of Mental Health, Counseling, and Student Affairs, the authors provide evidence-based practices and tangible techniques supported by the latest brain-based research and neuroscience. Full of tools that college students can use daily to assist with their relaxation, meditation, focus, and stress management, this book helps higher education professionals who are not trained mental health practitioners to effectively and confidently incorporate activities to support the whole student.

## Navigating Performance Stress: A Modern Approach

Performance stress and anxiety are complex phenomena that have been extensively studied and understood over the past fifteen years. Emerging theories and models now offer deeper insights into the specific pressures individuals face in high-stakes environments. These advancements build upon existing frameworks, providing a clearer picture of how stress and anxiety directly influence performance outcomes.

This evolving research has led to the development of more sophisticated statistical analyses and, consequently, safer and more effective strategies for managing performance-related stress and anxiety. However, a practical, up-to-date resource for students in performance programs and their mentors has been notably absent. "Managing Performance Stress" aims to bridge this gap. The book explores the psychological and psychophysiological underpinnings of performance anxiety, offering practical tools, exercises, and coaching techniques. It is designed as an accessible guide for athletes, musicians, dancers, and actors, as well as their coaches and educators, providing universal principles applicable across all performance domains.

Name: Encyclopedia of Clinical Neuropsychology
Description:
Clinical neuropsychology is a rapidly evolving specialty whose practitioners serve patients with traumatic brain injury, stroke and other vascular impairments, brain tumors, epilepsy and nonepileptic seizure disorders, developmental disabilities, progressive neurological disorders, HIV- and AIDS-related disorders, and dementia. . Services include evaluation, treatment, and case consultation in child, adult, and the expanding geriatric population in medical and community settings. The clinical goal always is to restore and maximize cognitive and psychological functioning in an injured or compromised brain. Most neuropsychology reference books focus primarily on assessment and diagnosis, and to date none has been encyclopedic in format. Clinicians, patients, and family members recognize that evaluation and diagnosis is only a starting point for the treatment and recovery process. During the past decade there has been a proliferation of programs, both hospital- and clinic-based, that provide rehabilitation, treatment, and treatment planning services. This encyclopedia will serve as a unified, comprehensive reference for professionals involved in the diagnosis, evaluation, and rehabilitation of adult patients and children with neuropsychological disorders.

Name: Essentials of Managing Stress
Description:
The fourth edition of Essentials of Managing Stress teaches readers practical skills and techniques on how to best handle daily stressors and empowers them with the tools needed to live a balanced life. The Fourth Edition is a highly accessible and student-friendly text that is designed to promote personal growth along with content retention. Students are guided through a series of more than 80 exercises and questionnaires that encourage them to adopt effective stress management practices into their personal health behaviors. A new chapter on Ecotherapy rounds out the text and provides insight into the healing powers of nature.

Name: Stress Management for Teachers
Description:
Ideal for use in teacher workshops, this book provides vital coping and problem-solving skills for managing the everyday stresses of the classroom. Specific strategies help teachers at any grade level gain awareness of the ways they respond in stressful situations and improve their overall well-being and effectiveness.
